title: BetterSwords
description: This Resourcepack improves visibility in PVP situations and is also asthetically pleasing to look at. It helps by making the swords short enough, but not too short. It also adds unique textures to the sword making the swords look much better
body: This Resourcepack is a great choice for anyone who wants there swords to be short but also asthetically pleasing. It makes the swords short enough for clear vision but also keeps it long enough so that it dosen't look ugly. This helps a lot in PVP sitiations or in mini games like Bedwars, Skywars etc. Also it changes the texture of the sword which makes the swords look a lot more asthetically pleasing(the logo of the pack is the reskin for the diamond sword.)
